label: The Saltwhite Cask
description: The Saltwhite Cask occupies a pressurized bay off the anchorage concourse, its basalt-composite ribs left exposed and varnished to a dull, sea-worn sheen. Salt-glass lanterns refract the lumen spire’s harsh radiance into pale bands that stripe the bar and bolted tables like tidal marks. A frieze of star-chart mosaics runs the upper wall, annotated with ritualized berth numbers that mirror the port’s sequence rights. Vacuum-rated shutters and micrometeoroid-scored plating serve as both décor and fortification, emphasizing the anchorage’s disciplined life against the ordered void.
